name: @thienhungdev/create-wp
description: CLI tool to scaffold WordPress sites with Laravel Herd

scripts.test: node --check bin/create-wp.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/delete.js && node --check src/herd.js && node --check src/manage.js && node --check src/packages.js && node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/wordpress.js && node --check src/wpcli.js && node --check src/utils/path.js && node --check src/utils/which.js

author: Thien Hung
